column1: text
European Central Bank holds interest rates steady amid mixed signals on inflation and economic growth in the eurozone.
Scientists discover a new species of deep-sea fish in the Pacific Ocean with bioluminescent properties never seen before.
Major technology company announces plans to invest 10 billion dollars in AI research centers across three continents.
City council approves ambitious urban green infrastructure plan to plant one million trees over the next decade.
International climate summit concludes with binding agreement to reduce carbon emissions by 45 percent by 2035.
Breakthrough gene therapy trial shows 90 percent success rate in treating rare childhood metabolic disorder.
Record-breaking heat wave sweeps across southern Europe, prompting health advisories and strain on power grids.
Central bank raises interest rates by 25 basis points to combat persistent inflation in consumer goods and housing.
Spacecraft successfully deploys solar panels after launching from Cape Canaveral on a mission to Mars orbit.
New study links ultra-processed food consumption to increased risk of cardiovascular disease and type-2 diabetes.
Tech startup raises 500 million in Series C funding to scale autonomous delivery robot operations in urban areas.
Historic peace negotiations between two neighboring nations resume after three years of diplomatic stalemate.
Electric vehicle manufacturer reports record quarterly deliveries, surpassing analyst expectations by 18 percent.
Researchers develop biodegradable plastic alternative from seaweed that decomposes in ocean water within weeks.
Global shipping disruption causes delays in electronics and consumer goods reaching retailers ahead of holiday season.
Astronomers detect a repeating radio signal from a galaxy 8 billion light years away with unknown origin.
Government announces major investment in high-speed rail network connecting 12 cities over the next 15 years.
Healthcare workers in three major hospital systems go on strike demanding improved staffing ratios and wages.
Wildfire season declared worst in regional history as dry conditions and strong winds fuel rapid spread.
New quantum computing chip achieves error correction milestone, bringing fault-tolerant quantum computers closer.
Central bank governor signals potential rate cuts in the second half of the year if inflation continues declining.
Ocean plastic cleanup organization removes over 10000 tonnes of debris from the Pacific Garbage Patch this year.
Social media platform introduces chronological feed option after user backlash against algorithmic ranking.
Biotech firm receives regulatory approval for new treatment targeting a previously undruggable cancer mutation.
International court orders multinational corporation to pay 2 billion in damages for environmental contamination.
City announces pilot program for four-day work week across all municipal departments starting next quarter.
Housing prices in major metropolitan areas decline for the third consecutive month amid rising mortgage rates.
Open-source AI foundation releases new multimodal model outperforming commercial competitors on key benchmarks.
Scientists successfully cultivate lab-grown meat at commercial scale, reaching price parity with conventional beef.
Cybersecurity incident exposes personal data of 30 million users of a major financial services platform.
Parliament passes landmark legislation requiring tech companies to disclose algorithmic content moderation decisions.
New archaeological excavation uncovers a previously unknown settlement dating back 4000 years in central Turkey.
Satellite imagery reveals accelerating retreat of Himalayan glaciers with significant implications for water supply.
Pharmaceutical company halts late-stage clinical trial after safety signals emerge in a subset of participants.
Record number of electric vehicles sold globally in the first quarter, led by markets in China and Europe.
University research team develops low-cost water purification method using sunlight and locally available materials.
Central bank stress tests show banking system resilient to economic downturn scenarios, regulator confirms.
Country announces free universal dental care program covering all citizens under the age of 25 from next year.
Space agency reveals detailed plan for crewed lunar base construction beginning in 2030 as international collaboration.
Agricultural technology startup deploys AI-powered drones for precision crop monitoring across 50000 acres.
Documentary series on deep ocean ecosystems wins international award for raising awareness of marine conservation.
Coalition of cities pledges to eliminate diesel buses from public transit networks by the end of the decade.
Tech giant faces antitrust investigation over bundling of cloud services with enterprise software licensing deals.
Researchers publish largest-ever dataset of 3D protein structures enabling advances in drug discovery research.
Country's gross domestic product grows by 3.2 percent in the second quarter, exceeding government forecasts.
International aid organization delivers emergency food supplies to 2 million people affected by severe drought.
Local elections result in historic victory for green party candidates in five major cities across the region.
Autonomous vehicle company receives permit to operate fully driverless taxis without safety driver in capital city.
New agreement between nations establishes joint Arctic research station to monitor climate and biodiversity changes.
Scientists confirm efficacy of universal flu vaccine candidate in large phase 3 trial across multiple continents.
